channel.title: Loadable component warning as it's a link

item.title: Loadable component warning as it's a link
item.dc:creator: shaguftashamid92
item.description:
It seems like you’re encountering a warning related to using Loadable Components in your React application when it’s associated with a link. Without specific details about the warning message or your code for 마나토끼, I’ll provide a general overview of how you might handle such warnings and potential solutions.

Read full topic
item.source: Loadable component warning as it's a link

item.title: Loadable component warning as it's a link
item.dc:creator: vova.champion
item.description:
Hi,
I started getting warning for all loadable modules like:
The resource https://.../static/StartPage.module.9dc50fc05941fb2ff024.js was preloaded using link preload but not used within a few seconds from the window's load event. Please make sure it has an appropriate as value and it is preloaded intentionally.
and I am using Frontity’s loadable.

import { loadable } from "frontity";

const LoadableStartPage = loadable(() =>
  import(/* webpackChunkName: "StartPage" */ `./pages/startPage/StartPage`)
);

export {
  LoadableStartPage,
  LoadableErrorPage,
...
};

I found in the core file loadable.cjs.js comment
Loadable.displayName = 'Loadable'; // In future, preload could use``
Do you know how can I fix it?

Read full topic
item.source: Loadable component warning as it's a link
